name: BRLE
description: BRLE is a Brazilian Real (BRL) pegged stablecoin issued by EFIX, a CVM-licensed (Resolution 88/2022) Brazilian protocol. Backed 1:1 by Brazilian Reais held in segregated custody at regulated institutions, with monthly attestation by Harris & Trotter. Redeemable on-chain via the EFIX Peg Stability Module.
